html:
Marble is a Mineral resource which is obtained by mining Marble Pillars, Harp Statues, and Maxwell Statues with any type of pickaxe, or by using a Touch Stone. It is used to make Checkerboard Flooring and Marble Suits.

Marble has the potential to fall during a Earthquakes in the Caves and Ruins, making it an unreliably renewable resource. It is the only mineral that Rock Lobsters, Slurtles, and Snurtles do not eat.

Trivia

  • Marble was added in A Little Rain Must Fall update.
ResourcesCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

Marble is a Mineral resource which is obtained by mining Marble Pillars, Harp Statues, and Maxwell Statues with any type of pickaxe, or by using a Touch Stone. It is used to make Checkerboard Flooring and Marble Suits.
Marble has the potential to fall during a Earthquakes in the Caves and Ruins, making it an unreliably renewable resource. It is the only mineral that Rock Lobsters, Slurtles, and Snurtles do not eat.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đá Cẩm Thạch là một loại tài nguyên Khoáng sản có được bằng cách khai thác Trụ Đá Cẩm Thạch, Tượng Đàn Hạc và Tượng Maxwell bằng bất kỳ loại cuốc nào hoặc bằng cách sử dụng Đá Xúc Giác. Nó được sử dụng để làm sàn bàn cờ và bộ đồ bằng đá cẩm thạch.

'''Marble''' is a [[:Category:Minerals|Mineral]] resource which is obtained by mining [[Marble Pillar]]s, [[Harp Statue]]s, and [[Maxwell Statue]]s with any type of pickaxe, or by using a [[Touch Stone]]. It is used to make [[Checkerboard Flooring]] and [[Marble Suit]]s.

Marble has the potential to fall during a [[Earthquake]]s in the [[Caves]] and [[Ruins]], making it an unreliably renewable resource. It is the only mineral that [[Rock Lobsters]], [[Slurtles]], and [[Snurtles]] do not eat.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Marble
|count1 = 1
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Checkerboard Flooring}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Marble
|count1 = 12
|item2 = Rope
|count2 = 4
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Marble Suit}}

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Marble was added in ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' update.
